holdings.keySummary: Compound semiconductor epitaxial wafers. Strategic £81M raise (May 2026) anchored by MACOM's £45M investment and LTSAs. Key defence supplier to U.S. primes (Raytheon Greensboro, BAE, Lockheed). Protected by January 2026 InP Executive Order. Under Segment-Pivot modifier rules, standard market cap gate is overridden, and gross margin underabsorption and historical execution misses are fully exempt.

High-performance direct liquid-cooled AI server builder and NVIDIA Elite Partner. Ramping Blackwell Ultra-powered Godì 1.8 platforms under a $610M master contract (Sacramento H2 2026) and a €140M Canadian-Japanese deployment. H1 25/26 revenue surged 9.8x to €204.7M; FY25/26 revenue guided to >€400M with a €1.00B FY26/27 target. Backed by proprietary cooling patents and February 2026 Chemours/Valeo partnerships. Yih-Shyan (Wally) Liaw (former President of 2CRSi Corp, departed April 2021) was indicted in March 2026 on unrelated export violations.

High-performance burn-in boards and reliability testing for next-generation AI GPUs. Secured $7.8M in orders. Completed $10M capital raise in April 2026 to fund Penang, Malaysia facility expansion (adjusted for -0.5 geopolitical penalty).

GPU-as-a-service cloud operator (Layer O) with owned physical fabric (Layer F). Disclosed contracted backlog exceeds $46B, including a $27B contract with Meta and $19.4B with Microsoft. Strategic $2B equity investment from NVIDIA. Monitor flag active due to historical fixed-asset accounting material weaknesses.
Edge AI driver monitoring system (DMS) software. Driven by the 7 July 2026 EU General Safety Regulation mandate. Royalty inflection underway; EBITDA positive. Traded via German ticker S9E.

Reference design for GlobalFoundries' SCALE™ platform and InP laser engine provider for Jabil's 1.6T LRO transceiver modules. Opportunity pipeline grew 77% YTD to $799M. Secured SEK 700M directed issue and $12M loan conversion in July 2026, resolving balance sheet risk. Trading at SEK 40.00 (10.11x return to $14.40B target).
Laser Induced Deep Etching (LIDE) technology for glass core packaging substrates. Core holding (20% of capital); waiting on downstream foundry adoption.

Specialised RF and microwave components chokepoint controlling 15-20% of premium cryogenic 4K pHEMT LNA supply for quantum computing readout. Validated by successful Spring 2026 O-RAN PlugFest participation and a GPU-accelerated Massive MIMO AI-RAN demonstration with NVIDIA/Northeastern. Reaffirmed FY26 revenue guidance of at least $50.0M (representing ~100% YoY growth), backed by $118M in active telecom MNO LOIs. Net proceeds of $16.4M from Q1 2026 rights offering leave the balance sheet debt-free with $18.4M in cash/securities.
Proprietary low-power Pulsed Coherent Radar (PCR) chips. Volume commercial production ramp underway in 2026. Traded via German ticker 4AC.

Optical DSP market monopoly (>80% share) and custom ASIC partner for Google, Amazon, and Meta. Strategic $2.0B partnership with Nvidia integrates custom XPUs directly into the NVLink Fusion platform. Secured advanced wafer/packaging capacity with $1.0B in prepayments. Tracked for intelligence value (market cap >$150B).

Vertically integrated manufacturer of high-speed transceivers and EML laser chips. Remediated technical material weaknesses and appointed PwC as auditor in May 2026. $600M ATM programme launched to fund Texas laser fab expansion. Microsoft and AWS are primary customers. Missed Q1 2026 earnings due to 800G transceiver shipment timing.
